sessions.question: Your organization has three Azure Virtual Networks: VNet-A, VNet-B, and VNet-C. VNet-A is peered with VNet-B, and VNet-B is peered with VNet-C. A virtual machine in VNet-A needs to communicate with a virtual machine in VNet-C. What must you do to enable this connectivity?
